match.userMessage:
Handheld eye-level wide tracks Scarlett stepping forward into shallow surf at Bondi shoreline. A gentle wave breaks at her feet sending foam and splashes around her ankles while she laughs with genuine immediate joy. Camera maintains natural micro-movement energy across the wet sand. Her body shifts lightly with the water. Ocean horizon and distant surfers hold in soft background. Subtle breeze lifts fabric at her sides and ripples the tide-line sand.

[SCARLETT, joyful light]: "Wear it everywhere."

Ambient sounds: ocean waves breaking, light wind, distant seagulls. gentle wave splash at feet, water foam receding on sand.
